name: Create Auth Tables
summary: Create the database structures required to support the auth integration epic.

tasks.name: Create user table
tasks.summary: Add the primary user table and its core columns needed by the auth flow.

tasks.name: Create session table
tasks.summary: Add the session storage table and relationships required for authenticated sessions.

tasks.name: Verify auth table integration
tasks.summary: Verify the application can read and write through the new auth-related tables.
